metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_3072
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Over-expression of PTN/HB-GAM diminishes LTP (Fig. 2C) and deletion of the coding gene enhances LTP (Fig. 4C). A later paper by the same group shows that this might occur via modulating inhibitory synapses involved in the circuit.. Experimental description: Role of Heparin-Binding Growth-Associated Molecule (HB-GAM) in Hippocampal LTP and Spatial Learning Revealed by Studies on Overexpressing and Knockout Mice (Title, p. 330)

20/4/2018 Pim
- Species of over-expressed PTN_MOUSE, Pleiotrophin, Heparin-binding growth-associated molecule (HB-GAM) Heparin-binding neutrophic factor; Osteoblast-specific factor 1 is not stated in the publication. Species was traced back to rat via PMID:217035: "l rats as described (6). The purified mRNA was used to synthesize cDNA with a random primer method (cDNA synthesis kit of Amersham Corp.)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
